name: Cordoba 2pk Wicker Patio Dining Chair with Cushion - Gray - Christopher Knight Home
description: The Cordoba 2 pk Wicker Patio Dining Chairs with Cushions by Christopher Knight Home are crafted for elegance. The set includes 2 armchairs that are all weather wicker with water resistant cushions. These dining chairs are easy to store when they are not in use. Place them around your outdoor dining table or you can use them as extra seating while entertaining. You will appreciate these Christopher Knight Home Cordoba 2 pk Wicker Patio Dining Chairs when guests come over.
